canonical_definition: The specific latent ability to comprehend and reason over inputs that contain an alternating sequence of visual and textual elements.
papers: Unified Generative and Discriminative Training for Multi-modal Large Language Models

definitions.text: The specific latent ability to comprehend and reason over inputs that contain an alternating sequence of visual and textual elements.
The latent capacity to process and understand multiple, interleaved, and multimodal contexts within a single input sequence.
definitions.paper: Unified Generative and Discriminative Training for Multi-modal Large Language Models

characterization: The specific latent ability to comprehend and reason over inputs that contain an alternating sequence of visual and textual elements.
